title: Evangelion 30 Screening at San Diego Comic Con
display_title: Evangelion 30 Screening at San Diego Comic Con
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 Screening at San Diego Comic Con             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 17, 2013 10:57 am It's nice how fast Funimation is screening 3.0. Our news post here: http://www.evageeks.org/2013/07/eva-3-0-at-sdcc/ Their blog post here: http://www.funimation.com/lee/blog/funimation-at-san-diego-comic-con/7785173 Anybody here think they're going? They can tell us how the translation is! To clarify, no idea yet if it'll be dubbed or subbed. Probably subbed?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Jul 17, 2013 12:16 pm I've only heard of Nuke going to SDCC so far.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Jul 17, 2013 12:54 pm It can't be dubbed, can it? It's not like they can just record the lines, they have to write their own script and do a lot of sound editing. Do they still write lines of dubbed dialogue to match the original mouth movements, or do they change them to match the dialogue now? I imagine that's entirely possible but I don't know if it would be too expensive or not. Also, I want Jive Hyuga back. Where do I send my petition?

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Wed Jul 17, 2013 2:36 pm Chuckman wrote: It can't be dubbed, can it? It's not like they can just record the lines, they have to write their own script and do a lot of sound editing. Do they still write lines of dubbed dialogue to match the original mouth movements, or do they change them to match the dialogue now? I imagine that's entirely possible but I don't know if it would be too expensive or not. Also, I want Jive Hyuga back. Where do I send my petition?

[]:             Quote Post by SSJ Spartan01 » Wed Jul 17, 2013 4:10 pm I'm going to be in San Diego this weekend! Downtown is beautiful at night, especially during Comic-Con, and I encourage all of you to check it out if ever given the opportunity. I haven't been to Comic-Con in years though, does anyone know if the screening will be of the official Funimation english sub? If so, then they're jamming pretty fast at work on it. The area outside the convention center is filled with fun cosplayers and entertainment advertisers so I'll see if I can hang around and report on any new info.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Jul 17, 2013 4:16 pm hui43210 wrote: I'm afraid Jive Hyuga was not a Funi member so no luck there.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Jul 17, 2013 8:17 pm Well theres been no info about who is doing the various new characters (ok so its only Sakura that gets more than a couple of lines) so I think the dub production is still at an early stage.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Jul 18, 2013 1:03 pm Yeah, I'd say they'll be playing the original Language with subs. By now, a cast list of who's playing what in the dub would have been provided. Also, it's too soon.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jul 19, 2013 3:56 am So, in a little less than seventeen hours the screening will begin, any members will participate? If that's the case, any possibilities for taking some notes to see the differences with the official French translation and the one made by our beloved Reichu and her team?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Jul 20, 2013 1:15 pm Well, I went to go see it! I also took notes on the subtitles, which were flat-out amazing. I'll post them as soon as I have access to my computer (I'm on my phone right now.)

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Jul 20, 2013 1:16 pm Merci mon ami!

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Sat Jul 20, 2013 2:32 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Well, I went to go see it! I also took notes on the subtitles, which were flat-out amazing. I'll post them as soon as I have access to my computer (I'm on my phone right now.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 22, 2013 10:17 am Did anybody go to Funi's Industry Panel on Thursday? I'm guessing they didn't say anything about when 3.0 would possibly be released on DVD/BD?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion » Mon Jul 22, 2013 4:48 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Did anybody go to Funi's Industry Panel on Thursday? I'm guessing they didn't say anything about when 3.0 would possibly be released on DVD/BD?

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Mon Jul 22, 2013 4:54 pm Evangelion wrote: This is something I would like to know as well!

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Jul 22, 2013 5:23 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Did anybody go to Funi's Industry Panel on Thursday? I'm guessing they didn't say anything about when 3.0 would possibly be released on DVD/BD?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion » Tue Jul 23, 2013 1:10 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: They mentioned nothing, which made me sad.

Article: Evangelion 30 Screening at San Diego Comic Con
10 pm I'm going to be in San Diego this weekend! Downtown is beautiful at night, especially during Comic-Con, and I encourage all of you to check it out if ever given the opportunity. I haven't been to Comic-Con in years though, does anyone know if the screening will be of the official Funimation english sub? If so, then they're jamming pretty fast at work on it. The area outside the convention center is filled with fun cosplayers and entertainment advertisers so I'll see if I can hang around and report on any new info.
